rationale: The pair is not an obvious incidental mention: the citing paper’s core mechanism is depletion from resolving larger choice trade-offs, while the cited paper directly studies trade-off aversion/negative emotion in consumer multiattribute choice. This thematic and mechanism-level overlap (trade-off conflict/aversion in choice) suggests the cited work could be a substantive theory source rather than generic background. With only DOI-level match evidence and no in-text snippet, it should be retained for full relation judgment rather than dropped.
